blocks.speaker: Coach Briggs
blocks.content: Speed group. Forty yard dash. Two at a time. Line up.
There were maybe twelve of us. I ended up paired with a sophomore named Trey who looked like he ran track. He probably did.
Coach Briggs stood at the finish line. Not the start. He wanted to see who you were at the end, not the beginning.

blocks.prompt: The forty yards are right in front of you.

options.label: Run like you have something to prove.
Run your own race. Don't chase him.
You start thinking halfway through and feel yourself slow.
You hesitate at the start. A full second late.
